subcodes.title: Words to Louis Gregory, spoken on 1911-04-15
subcodes.first_line: The most important thing is deeds. Good deeds are accepted by all nations and religions. As to presenting the teachings by word, the teacher must be as a skillful physician
subcodes.subjects: @goodly deeds; actions, @methods of teaching the Cause, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @being a source of light; guidance, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
